calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-08-2013 Off Calendar

Notice For Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Feb-28-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Darius T. Chan, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Jason Lui.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Franklin's Recycling, Inc. and Franklin Smith.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1- 10 dismissed without prejudice.
Jason Lui Sworn and examinded.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $57,064.10
Pre-Judgment Interest at the annual rate of 10%: $19,381.20
Costs: $606.40
Total Judgment in the amount of $77,051.70
Judgment signed in open court.
